C

cancelMyReservation(Long, Long) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.service.ReservationService
Cancels a specific reservation owned by the requesting user.
cancelMyReservation(Long, String) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.controller.ReservationController
Cancels a specific reservation owned by the authenticated user.

createReservation(ReservationDTO, String, String) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.controller.ReservationController
Books a hotel room for the authenticated user.

Creates a new reservation after passing all validation checks.

D

deleteReservation(Long) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.controller.ReservationController
Deletes any reservation by ID regardless of ownership.
deleteReservation(Long) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.service.ReservationService
Deletes any reservation by ID regardless of ownership.
doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, FilterChain) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.security.JwtAuthFilter
Validates the JWT token and sets the authenticated principal in the security context.

E

existsOverlappingReservation(Long, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in interface com.hotelreservation.reservation.repository.ReservationRepository
Checks whether a conflicting reservation exists for the given room and date range.

F

findByUserIdOrderByCheckInDateDesc(Long) - Method in interface com.hotelreservation.reservation.repository.ReservationRepository
Retrieves all reservations for a given user, ordered by check-in date descending (most recent first).

G

getAllReservations() - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.controller.ReservationController
Retrieves all reservations in the system.
getAllReservations() - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.service.ReservationService
Retrieves all reservations in the system.
getMyReservations(Long) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.service.ReservationService
Retrieves all reservations belonging to a specific user, ordered by check-in date descending.
getMyReservations(String) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.reservation.controller.ReservationController
Retrieves all reservations belonging to the currently authenticated user.
